items.title: Installed adguardhome to windows and it only works in the computer itself
items.author: /u/Reasonable_Monk_1822
items.content: I can only make it work inside the windows pc and not in the router or any other devices inside the network. I do not know what is wrong. I setup the adguardhome as instructed online and it works but only in the device it is installed (windows pc). Trying to use it with other device or even the router itself do not work at all. What am i missing? Do i need to change some sort of firewall settings in windows?
